extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIC Primoz won uphill sprint finish at La Guardia, gaining 13 seconds via intermediate sprint bonuses and stage win bonuses over GC rivals
tactical_patterns: ROGLIC accumulated 13 seconds purely through bonus seconds hunting (intermediate sprint plus finish), amplifying gains beyond placement alone.
Jumbo-Visma positioned ROGLIC at both intermediate sprint and summit KOM for bonuses, methodical time-stealing strategy on non-mountain stage.
MADSPETERSEN beaten in sprint despite leading out, revealing ROGLIC's superior punch on uphill drags even against pure sprinters.
YATES Simon lost time from gap opening behind leaders, suggesting positioning weakness on short punchy finishes rather than pure form deficit.

rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: Won uphill sprint convincingly after recovering from vertebrae fractures sustained in Tour crash, form questions definitively answered.
rider_signals.MADSPETERSEN Mads: neutral: Three consecutive second places shows consistency but inability to convert against puncheurs on uphill drags despite pure sprint speed.
rider_signals.MAS Enrique: positive: Third place and bonus seconds gained as non-sprinter shows positioning discipline and punch superior to other pure GC riders.
rider_signals.YATES Simon: negative: Lost additional time through positioning gap, not just bonus seconds, revealing weakness in finale chaos management on punchy stages.
rider_signals.LUTSENKO Alexey: neutral: Moved into virtual lead via breakaway despite being 46 seconds down, showing teams allowed dangerous GC-threatening breaks early.
